Patch Set 1:

Hmm, tests not triggered since yesterday? and nothing in the test queue...

My understanding is that the review-dne-ssk and review-dne-selinux-ssk test groups are always considered optional, so even if they are specified explicitly, they might not be run.

parents.subject: LU-13182 llite: Avoid eternel retry loops with MAP_POPULATE

commit.subject: ATM-1873 tests: run security tests
commit.message:
ATM-1873 tests: run security tests

Let's run review-dne-ssk and review-dne-selinux-ssk
to see if they repeatedly pass and, if not, what tests
do not pass and why.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el7.8 serverdistro=el7.8 testgroup=review-dne-ssk optional=false
Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el7.8 serverdistro=el7.8 testgroup=review-dne-ssk optional=false
Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el8.2 serverdistro=el8.2 testgroup=review-dne-ssk optional=false
Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el8.2 serverdistro=el8.2 testgroup=review-dne-ssk optional=false
Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el8.2 serverdistro=el8.2 testgroup=review-dne-ssk optional=false
Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el7.8 serverdistro=el7.8 testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk optional=false
Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el7.8 serverdistro=el7.8 testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk optional=false
Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el8.2 serverdistro=el8.2 testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk optional=false
